extortion.description: ceaca.net zoominfo.com/c/centro-de-especialidades-anzoátegui-ca---ceaca/467549041 Centro de Especialidades Anzotegui, CA - CEACA is a well-known medical center serving patients in eastern Venezuela and the Caribbean islands since 1971. We offer complete health services including emergency care, specialized medical consultations, surgery, and intensive care for adults and newborns. Our team provides compassionate treatment with a deep respect for human life and patient well-being
